title: Grass Overhaul
description: More grass approaches. Patches, slabs, stairs, you name it. Forge/Fabric/QuiltMC
body:
![Grass Overhaul Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Grass_Overhaul/BH_GO_Header.webp)


**Grass Overhaul is decoration & QoL mod that adds stackable carpet-like, slab, stair and full sod blocks.**
These sods can be used to make a more detailed terrain while preserving that vanilla look. It even is compatible with texture packs. 

 

 

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Grass_Overhaul/BH_GO_Features.webp)



🌱 Sod blocks, slabs and patches. For grass, mycelium, podzol and crimson/warped nylium.


🎨 Seamless color. Sods use vanilla grass tint, which means it will match the color from the biome it's in!


✏️ Texture pack compatibility. All sods use vanilla textures, which means resource packs are compatible by default.


☀️ Shader PBR compatibility. Are you using a resourcepack with PBR? Sods will have it too!


⚙️ Vanilla & Modded map compatibility (Correct coloring on maps and minimaps like Xaero's or FTB)


🧟 Control mob spawning. Mobs can't spawn in sod patches, so you can control spawning in a good looking way.
  

![Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1083823318358032394/1085383437969534997/BH_GO_Frame.png)
